hero.subtitle: Healthier, More Effective
hero.description: We provide local solutions to nutritional challenges and actively contribute to the development of transportation and logistics in the Democratic Republic of Congo and the region.

about.title: About Olidor sarl
about.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner in agri-food and logistics
about.p1: Olidor Sarl is a company committed to the production, processing, marketing and distribution of nutritional and agri-food inputs, as well as the provision of vehicle rental, transport and logistics services.
about.p2: With local expertise and an innovative approach, Olidor has established itself as a key player in meeting the varied needs of households, humanitarian organizations and companies in the region.
reasons: Local expertise and recognized know-how for quality product transformation and distribution.
Social commitment: Fighting malnutrition and supporting humanitarian actions through its parent organization to achieve social responsibility.
Flexible and personalized services, adapted to each client and context.
Responsiveness and reliability in logistics and transport management, in both urban and rural areas.
about.servicesSubtitle: Comprehensive solutions to meet all your needs

servicesList.title: Agri-food Production
servicesList.description: Distribution and marketing of agri-food products with an extensive network throughout the region.

servicesList.title: Marketing and Distribution
servicesList.description: Vehicle rental services, transport, and logistics solutions tailored to your specific needs.

servicesList.title: Transport, Rental & Logistics
servicesList.description: Complete logistics services for humanitarian organizations and businesses.

cta.title: Ready to work with us?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today to discuss your needs

logistics.title: Transport, Vehicle Rental & Logistics Services
logistics.description: True to its mission of facilitating your activities, Olidor sarl offers a complete range of logistics services adapted to every need.
logistics.rentalDesc: Comfortable and robust vehicles (Land-Cruiser, Prado), available for all your travels, whether in town or rural areas. Olidor Sarl offers adapted and well-maintained vehicles to guarantee safety and serenity on every journey.
logistics.transportDesc: We ensure the secure transport of your goods and medicines, respecting safety and quality standards. Our fleet and team guarantee reliable and on-time delivery.

realisations.title: Achievements
realisations.description: Our performance reflects our commitment to providing quality nutritional and logistical solutions.
realisations.subtitle: Discover the concrete results that strengthen the trust of our clients and partners.

nutrition.title: Nutrition – 85% Client Satisfaction
nutrition.p1: Olidor Sarl records a 90% satisfaction rate in the supply of nutritional products.
nutrition.p2: Our clients appreciate the quality, compliance, and effectiveness of our government-validated solutions.
nutrition.p3: We remain committed to meeting nutritional needs with rigor and innovation.

logistics.title: Logistics – 80% Satisfaction
logistics.p1: Our logistics services achieve an 85% satisfaction rate, thanks to a reliable and flexible offer.
logistics.p2: Clients recognize our responsiveness, even in difficult-to-access areas.
logistics.p3: Olidor continues to optimize its operations to strengthen performance and trust.

chart.p1: With an 85% client satisfaction rate, Olidor Sarl confirms the trust placed by its partners in the fields of nutrition and logistics.
chart.p2: This figure reflects the quality of our products, the reliability of our services, and our ability to meet the specific needs of each client.
chart.p3: We remain committed to continuously improving our services to aim for even higher satisfaction.

footer.description: Your trusted partner for innovation in complementary food production, nutritional solutions, and integrated logistics services.
footer.address: Our address: Goma, North-Kivu, DR Congo
